race.comment: GET LITT (8) ran on stoutly but just missed two back over 1250m at Newcastle. Began awkwardly then over-raced in a run worth forgetting at Goulburn last start. Back a little in trip and is a winning chance based on that Newcastle performance. ENCRYPTIX (2) was well in commission and did a good job to hang on for third on debut over 1100m at Gosford a fortnight ago. Will enjoy the extra trip and with a soft run assured out of the inside draw he makes plenty of appeal. SIRIUS MOSS (11) raced back in the field and wide but still managed to pass a few and finish just 2.2 lengths from the winner when resuming here recently. Gets an extra 100m today which suits. One of the better hopes. LET'S BE HONEST (9) is going okay but hasn't looked a winning hope at her last couple. Very fit and one for the exotics. PACIFIC MICK (3) can improve over an extra 200m at the third run back from a spell.
